response.justification: Candidate is a Senior/Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying to an entry-level Junior role, creating a significant seniority and likely compensation mismatch. German proficiency is only 'Basic', falling well short of the 'strong verbal and written German' requirement for client-facing insurance consulting work. Java is listed as a skill but the bulk of experience is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with no demonstrated insurance-sector or Java-centric project history.
strengths: CS degree and strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Based in Berlin, DE — travel within Germany is feasible
Broad polyglot experience including Java and object-oriented design
concerns: Severe overqualification for an entry-level Junior position
German listed as only 'Basic' vs. required strong German fluency
Primary expertise is JS/TS and DLang, not Java; no insurance domain exposure

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and OOP background
